2026-07-19.line: 11am Post Carousel #1 (5 things Claude, 7 slides) to TikTok photo mode + IG
2026-07-19.caption: TikTok: What is Claude used for? 5 things you didn't know Claude could do 🔖 #Claude #AI #AITools
2026-07-19.caption_ig: 5 things you didn't know Claude AI could do 🤯 Save this + send #2 to your friend who codes everything by hand. #Claude #AI #AITools #Productivity
2026-07-19.tip: On TikTok add a trending calm/lofi background sound to the photo post, it boosts reach.

2026-07-19.line: 12pm Post X article #1 (5 things Claude) + header image
2026-07-19.tip: Copy the article + attach the '5 Things' header image from our Claude chat. Stay 10 min for replies.
Record ALL screen captures first (PDF, app build, spreadsheet, emails, prompt comparisons, trades estimate), then all face clips in one sitting.

2026-07-20.line: 1pm Post Quick Video A 'What is Anthropic' to TikTok + IG + YouTube Shorts
2026-07-20.hook: Over 90 thousand people googled what is Anthropic this week. Here's the answer in 35 seconds.
2026-07-20.caption: TikTok: What is Anthropic? The company behind Claude, explained in 35 seconds. Everyone is searching this right now 🔎 #Anthropic #Claude #AI #TechTok
2026-07-20.caption_ig: What is Anthropic and why is everyone suddenly searching it? The Claude company, explained fast. Send this to your group chat. #Anthropic #Claude #AI
2026-07-20.tip: One take, face to camera. Say 'what is Anthropic' in the first 3 seconds. YouTube title: 'What is Anthropic? Explained in 35 Seconds' #Shorts

2026-07-20.line: Optional if time: film tomorrow's 1Password video (one take talking head)
2026-07-20.tip: Filming ahead by one day keeps posting stress free. Skip if today is packed.

2026-07-21.line: 9am Post LinkedIn PDF carousel (5 Things Claude deck)
2026-07-21.tip: Upload the PDF from our chat as a document post, 8 to 10am window. Caption is in chat too. PDFs get big dwell time on LinkedIn.
Article #2 + 'Claude Can Now Log Into Your Accounts' image from chat. No filming needed, just paste.

2026-07-21.line: 1pm Film + post Video 2 'Claude logs into accounts' to TikTok + IG + YouTube Shorts
2026-07-21.hook: Claude can now log into your accounts for you. And no, that's not a hack, it's official.
2026-07-21.caption: Claude can now use your 1Password logins, what is Anthropic even building? AI that actually DOES things is here. Would you trust it? #Claude #AI #TechNews #Anthropic
2026-07-21.tip: One take talking head, your fastest format. End on the question, comment debates are fuel. This is the only filming today.

2026-07-22.line: BATCH FILM DAY: 6 videos for Wed through Sat
2026-07-22.tip: Order: skill news first (posts 1pm TODAY), dead giveaways, AI therapist, ChatGPT wrong, Claude part 3 screen demos, trades part 3. ElevenLabs too if the clone is ready. Change shirts between talking heads.

2026-07-22.line: 1pm Post NEWS 'Teach Claude a skill by showing it' to TikTok + IG + YouTube Shorts
2026-07-22.hook: Anthropic dropped something this morning: you can now teach Claude Cowork a skill by literally showing it. I'm a software developer, let me tell you why this is wild.
2026-07-22.caption: TikTok: Claude Cowork just got scary good: teach it a skill by recording your screen ONCE 🤯 New from Anthropic this morning. What would you teach it first? #Claude #ClaudeCowork #AI #TechNews #Anthropic
2026-07-22.caption_ig: You can now TEACH Claude skills by showing it your screen once 🤯 Dropped this morning. Send this to someone who does the same task every single day. #Claude #AI #Anthropic #TechNews
2026-07-22.tip: Overlay the @claudeai announcement screenshot + Record a skill UI. Cover text: Teach Claude by showing it. YouTube title: 'You Can Now Teach Claude Skills by Showing It' #Shorts

2026-07-22.line: 3pm Post '3 dead giveaways someone used ChatGPT' to TikTok + IG + YouTube Shorts
2026-07-22.hook: I can tell in three seconds when something was written by ChatGPT. Here are the dead giveaways.
2026-07-22.caption: TikTok: How to tell if something was written by ChatGPT, 3 dead giveaways 😅 Teachers already know all of these. What word gives it away instantly? #ChatGPT #AI #AIWriting #TeachersOfTikTok
2026-07-22.caption_ig: 3 dead giveaways someone used ChatGPT to write it 😬 Send this to a teacher or that one coworker. Which one do you catch the most? #ChatGPT #AI #AIWriting
2026-07-22.tip: Cover text: 3 signs it was written by AI. YouTube title: '3 Dead Giveaways Something Was Written by ChatGPT' #Shorts

2026-07-23.caption: The ChatGPT psychology prompt everyone's searching 🧠 Full prompt is on slide 2, save this. Rate yours 1 to 10 below. #ChatGPT #AI #Prompts

2026-07-23.line: 10am Post X article #3 (psychology prompt) + header image
1pm Post 'People are using AI as a therapist' + Carousel #2 to TikTok, video also to IG + YouTube Shorts

2026-07-23.line: 3pm Post 'Things you didn't know Claude could do PART 3' to TikTok + IG + YouTube Shorts

2026-07-24.line: 1pm Post Video 5 'Talking to ChatGPT wrong' to TikTok + IG + YouTube Shorts

2026-07-24.line: 3pm Post ElevenLabs video 'I cloned my voice with AI' to TikTok + IG + YouTube Shorts
